codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the P2P follow-up remained tightly scoped to the still-live PR #98 comments: `PurchaseInvoiceEngine` now re-reads GRN movements before AP journal linkage, `PurchaseInvoiceEngineLifecycleTest` covers the linkage behavior, and `docs/approvals/R2-CHECKPOINT.md` records the required scope evidence for the carried accounting-facade risk. No new review issues were visible on the propagated diff, and the milestone validators passed on the current branch, so the feature passes on reachable commit `610e63dee94edb542797195bf33242a2c48cd8cf` (`fix(p2p): close remaining PR #98 live comments`).

summary: Pass. PR #98's live linkage/governance follow-up remains review-clean on commit `610e63dee94edb542797195bf33242a2c48cd8cf`, with current-GRN linkage and R2 evidence both present.
